item.description:
WhisperFree v4.5

  • Remote transcription via Groq/OpenAI/AssemblyAI (optional alternative to local Parakeet)
  • List formatting with conservative auto-detection
  • Setting to disable vocabulary biasing
  • Fix: silent transcription hallucinations
  • Fix: vocabulary biasing was silently no-op (CTC token IDs not populated)
  • Fix: stuck Transcribing pill
  • Fix: stray .. artifacts in punctuation
